mapper.sql: SELECT id, question, answer, category, enabled, order_num, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM cdc_knowledge_faq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cdc_knowledge_faq (question, answer, category, enabled, order_num, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{question}, #{answer}, #{category}, #{enabled}, #{orderNum}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})

INSERT INTO cdc_knowledge_faq (question, answer, category, enabled, order_num, create_by, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.question}, #{item.answer}, #{item.category}, #{item.enabled}, #{item.orderNum}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate())
